descriptions.text: A Digimon rom hack of Pokemon Emerald which features 350+ new monsters with unique stats, abilities, typing, and movepools built from the ground-up,as many as five to six stages for prominent Digimon, custom moves from the Digimon canon, Digidex Entries state criteria for evolution, EV/IV Checker, Up to Gen VII Abilities and Moves, Reusable TMs, Fairy Type, Physical-Special Split, Poison Survival, BW Repel System, and much more.
